original: This slave collar is a cheap but effective method of motivating slave workers. Cheap circuitry housed in a durable, remote-locking package allows for easy dispensation of motivation - primarily in the form of electric shock.\n\nSo long as you’re a disobedient adventurer, you won’t be able to regain HP or energy by resting!
